name: The Shadow War
description: A sprawling campaign of political intrigue, ancient horrors, and desperate alliances as the Shadow Court orchestrates a continent-wide conspiracy to shatter the fragile peace between the Iron Dominion and the Sylvan Reach. The players must uncover the truth before the Hollow consumes all.

properties.themes: Betrayal, sacrifice, the cost of power, and the nature of evil
properties.startingLocation: The Hollow Bough Tavern in Thornwall
